summary: Comprehensive testing of three new features: (1) My Submissions page - fully working with stats cards, filters, and proper role-based access. (2) Document upload endpoints - metadata-only and full upload with metadata working correctly. (3) Driver Portal document access - showing vehicle documents with expiry status. All backend tests passed (22/22). UI testing confirmed all features working as expected.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed document metadata entries during backend testing for cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three new features tested and working: (1) My Submissions page shows stats cards (Pending Check, Awaiting Approval, Approved, Rejected), status filter, and empty state message. Link appears for Maker/Admin but NOT for Checker/Approver. (2) Document upload has metadata-first flow with POST /api/documents/metadata and full upload with POST /api/documents/upload. (3) Driver Portal shows driver profile, vehicle details, document expiry status (VALID/EXPIRED/2d warning), and uploaded documents section.
passed_tests: 1. Maker login - 'My Submissions' link visible in sidebar
2. /my-submissions page loads with stats cards and empty state
3. My Submissions API returns submissions filtered by user
4. Admin login - 'My Submissions' link visible in sidebar
7. POST /api/documents/metadata - creates document with pending_upload status
8. POST /api/documents/upload - uploads document with file and metadata
10. Driver login - auto-redirected to /driver-portal with full page layout
11. Driver Portal - shows profile, vehicle details, documents with expiry status
22 backend API tests passed covering auth, my-submissions, documents, driver portal
